content:
# No Local Thermal Equilibrium

**Summary**: A condition where the rock and fluid are allowed to have different temperatures.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] evaluated the NOLTE formulation to determine if it provided significantly more accuracy than LTE.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] More complex model that accounts for temperature differences between phases.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Comparison of two mathematical models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The results from the NOLTE numerical simulators reveal that the rock and fluid temperatures are almost identical. ([[2016-david|DAVID, 2016, p. 18]])
- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] Showed nearly identical temperatures to the LTE case.
